raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both arms have unobstructed lateral access to the sides of box_1, and there is at least 15 cm of free space above the stacked boxes to allow upward motion. The friction between box_2 and the tabletop is sufficient to keep box_2 in place when the upper box is lifted.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is securely held between the two end-effectors and detached from box_2, lifted a few centimeters above it."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1 is firmly grasped by both arms and clear of any contact with box_2 or the table surface.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is held stably in mid-air by the robot’s two arms, completing the pick-up task."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Both arms have unobstructed lateral access to the sides of box_1, and there is at least 15 cm of free space above the stacked boxes to allow upward motion. The friction between box_2 and the tabletop is sufficient to keep box_2 in place when the upper box is lifted.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is securely held between the two end-effectors and detached from box_2, lifted a few centimeters above it.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1 is firmly grasped by both arms and clear of any contact with box_2 or the table surface.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is held stably in mid-air by the robot’s two arms, completing the pick-up task.
